sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: System overview with stat cards, weekly activity chart, and recent actions list

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Project grid with search, status indicators, progress bars, and project metadata

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Personal task list with checkable items, quick notes textarea, and deadline tracker

sections.name: Kanban
sections.description: Four-column drag-and-drop task board: Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: SVG canvas with drawing toolbar and pre-rendered service architecture diagram

sections.name: Schema
sections.description: Database entity tables showing Users, Projects, Ideas, Tasks with field types and keys

sections.name: Directory
sections.description: Collapsible file/folder tree with toggle controls and file size metadata

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: Idea capture form and card grid with status badges, tags, and filter controls

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Chat interface with system, user, and AI messages plus text input for sending

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Profile form, appearance toggles, notification switches, and data/privacy actions
